use_cases: Display key financial metrics like credit scores or investment performance
Present comparison data across multiple financial indicators
Show transactional summaries with status badges in dashboards
Render KPI cards for financial analytics applications
ai_summary: A financial score card component system designed to display key metrics, scores, and performance indicators in a clean, dashboard-friendly format. Features metric cards with visual hierarchy, status indicators via badge components, and supports financial data visualization for fintech applications. Provides a modern, minimal aesthetic suitable for data-heavy interfaces requiring quick metric comprehension.
